components.name: Theme Validation
reasons: Uses confidence and coverage signals from the theme validation layer.
The assessment remains deterministic and does not depend on title-specific branching.

components.name: Character Validation
reasons: Uses confidence and coverage signals from the character validation layer.
The assessment remains deterministic and does not depend on title-specific branching.

components.name: Learning Outcome Validation
reasons: Uses confidence and coverage signals from the learning outcome validation layer.
The assessment remains deterministic and does not depend on title-specific branching.

components.name: Validation Coverage
reasons: Uses overall validation coverage as the main signal for potential impact.
If coverage is sparse, the impact is capped at low or insufficient data.

components.name: Validation Confidence
reasons: Uses the calibrated confidence score for the validation stack.
Higher confidence indicates more stable impact assessment.

components.name: Quality Comparison
reasons: Uses the quality comparison delta and confidence as the main signal.
A stronger delta with more confidence raises the estimated impact.

components.name: Recommendation Engine
reasons: Uses the number of generated recommendations and their average confidence.
A richer recommendation set suggests stronger shadow-side impact.

components.name: Promotion Readiness
reasons: Uses promotion readiness confidence and the readiness state as the main signal.
A clearer readiness signal suggests more potential impact on deployment decisions.
